curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff, which modifies only sydent/util/emailutils.py in the sendEmail function. The fix adds an explicit ssl.create_default_context(purpose=ssl.Purpose.SERVER_AUTH) and passes it as the context parameter to both smtplib.SMTP_SSL and smtp.starttls(). No sibling files in sydent/util/ share the same SMTP/TLS pattern. Pre-assigned class crypto-weakness (from CWE-295 Improper Certificate Validation) is correct — the vulnerability is a missing TLS certificate verification on outbound SMTP connections.
